mission.title: containerd: CRI: Windows images created with "shell form" CMD in Dockerfile are broken
mission.description: CRI: Windows images created with "shell form" CMD in Dockerfile are broken. This issue affects 8+ users.

steps.title: Identify containerd troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your containerd deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd -n containerd --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for error: `code = Unknown desc = failed to start containerd task \"355a1e78037b8b38495e7bdf738728c9e23ea338b6a449d707706897eee4bcfd`

steps.title: Review containerd configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant containerd configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd
kubectl get configmap -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=containerd
```
On Windows, the command to execute in a container needs to be given as a single CommandLine string. This is different from Linux where an array of string args is given (as used by `execve`).

steps.title: Apply the fix for CRI: Windows images created with "shell form" CMD in…
steps.description:
> Any update on this by chance? Note that its not just _Shell_ form its also _Exec_ form that is broken. And the fix proposed will only fix _Shell_ form commands. (Which is better than no fix at all!).
> 
> EX:
> 
> ```
> FROM mcr.microsoft.com/windows/servercore:ltsc2019
> 
> ENTRYPOINT ["ping",
```yaml
Or in "shell" form:
```

steps.title: Confirm CRI: Windows images created with "shell form" CMD… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd -n containerd --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n containerd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that `code = Unknown desc = failed to start containerd task \"355a1e78037b8b38495e7bdf738728c9e23ea338b6a449d707706897eee4bcfd` no longer appears in logs.

resolution.summary: > Any update on this by chance? Note that its not just _Shell_ form its also _Exec_ form that is broken. And the fix proposed will only fix _Shell_ form commands. (Which is better than no fix at all!).

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with containerd installed or the issue environment reproducible.
